mapper.select: SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.start_time AS startTime, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, s.name AS subjectName, c.name AS classroomName, t1.cnt AS studentCount FROM lecture l INNER JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.subject_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON ta.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN classroom c ON c.classroom_id = l.classroom_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) cnt, l.lecture_id FROM lecture l INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id GROUP BY l.lecture_id ) t1 ON l.lecture_id = t1.lecture_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT u.name AS studentName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, s.name AS subjectName FROM payment p INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id WHERE se.lecture_id IN ( SELECT lecture_id FROM teacher_assignment WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} )

SELECT u.name AS studentName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, s.name AS subjectName, v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, u.address FROM payment p INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON l.lecture_id = va.lecture_id INNER JOIN vehicle v ON va.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id WHERE se.lecture_id IN ( SELECT lecture_id FROM teacher_assignment WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} )

SELECT u.user_id AS teacherId, u.name, u.phone, u.address, u.birth, th.last_education AS lastEducation, th.personal_history AS personalHistory FROM user u INNER JOIN teacher_history th ON u.user_id = th.teacher_id WHERE u.user_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT m.material_title AS materialTitle, m.total_count AS totalCount, m.used_count AS usedCount, s.name AS subjectName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek FROM material m INNER JOIN lecture l ON m.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.subject_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON ta.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
